title: sabularia brevifolia
intro: Sabularia brevifolia, also known as Mountain Sage, is a perennial plant native to the United States. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of sore throats and minor wounds, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Sabularia brevifolia include reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and protection against bacterial and fungal infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
